messages.content: Build a pure Decider for an ArtisanStudio aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve with discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw DomainError when opening a studio that is already open.
How do I model a CraftCommission as a Decider in TypeScript? Show decide, evolve, and initialState with typed commands quote, accept, deliver.

Explain briefly how a Decider captures the lifecycle of a KilnFiring, then show a typed implementation with schedule, ignite, complete commands.

A Decider is a record of three pure functions. initialState seeds the fold; decide validates and emits events; evolve advances state deterministically. Together they describe the full lifecycle of a single aggregate without any I/O.
Write a GlazeTest Decider in TypeScript. Constraints: no any, exhaustive switch with a never default, pure functions only, reject starting an already completed test.
Build a Decider for an ExhibitionPiece aggregate in TypeScript with submit, accept, display, retire commands. Use discriminated unions and throw on invariant violations.
Build a projection that folds ArtistCollective events into a roster read model. Include project and emptyView; ignore events it does not care about.
Show a projection that builds a TradeShowEntry directory view from events. Use project(view, event) and exhaustively handle the events it cares about.
How do I build a daily-sales read model for MarketStall events in TypeScript? Show emptyView and project with discriminated union events.
Write a projection that folds MentorshipSession events into a progress view. Constraints: no any, exhaustive switch, project function shaped as (view, event) => view.
Implement a versioned snapshot upgrade for ArtisanStudio. v1 has {id, owner}; v2 adds memberCount; v3 renames owner to founder. Include upgradeSnapshot with two upgraders.
Build a Snapshot loader for CraftCommission that upgrades from v1 (flat price) to v2 (price + currency) to v3 (adds deposit). Include CURRENT_VERSION and upgradeSnapshot.

Explain briefly how snapshot versioning works in event sourcing, then implement upgradeSnapshot for KilnFiring: v1 tracks id and temp; v2 adds a profile field; v3 renames temp to peakTemp.

A snapshot is a frozen aggregate state tagged with a schema version. When loading, you run sequential upgrader functions from the stored version up to CURRENT_VERSION, so old snapshots remain usable after the state shape evolves.
Implement an optimistic-concurrency write path for GlazeTest. Define a local EventStore interface with expectedRevision, read current revision, append, and translate conflicts to ConcurrencyConflict.
Write a TypeScript helper appendWithOCC(store, stream, events, revision) that appends to an EventStore with expectedRevision and throws a ConcurrencyConflict on mismatch for ExhibitionPiece streams.
Show an Effect.gen wrapper around appendToStream with expectedRevision for SupplyRestock. Fail with a tagged ConcurrencyConflict error on mismatch.
Implement a TypeScript CommandHandler for ArtisanStudio that loads state with readStream, calls decide, and appends with expectedRevision. Use a local EventStore interface.
Build a CommandHandler for CraftCommission: loads events with readStream, folds to state via evolve, decides, and appends with expected revision.
Write an Effect.gen CommandHandler for KilnFiring that reads the stream, decides, and appends with expectedRevision. Use tagged errors for domain and concurrency failures.
Write a CommandHandler for GlazeTest. Constraints: no any, local EventStore interface, handler only orchestrates — no business logic inside.
Build a checkpoint-aware subscription runner for ExhibitionPiece events. Read the last checkpoint, iterate events, apply the projection, persist the checkpoint AFTER applying.
Show a resumable subscription for ArtistCollective events with a CheckpointStore. Apply each event to a roster view and persist the new checkpoint after the apply succeeds.
Implement an Effect.gen subscription that reads MarketStall events from a checkpoint, projects each, and persists the new checkpoint with tryPromise.
Show a generic aggregateStream helper in TypeScript that folds an AsyncIterable of events into a state. Apply it to CraftCommission events.
Write a when-style projector for KilnFiring: a when(state, event) dispatcher keyed by event.type that returns the new state. Use it inside aggregateStream.
How do I reconstruct ExhibitionPiece state by replaying an event array with a pure evolve? Show a typed aggregate helper and a when dispatcher.
Write a generic aggregateStream<S, E> that iterates an AsyncIterable<E> and folds via evolve(state, event). Demonstrate it with SupplyRestock events.
Implement upcasting for ArtisanStudio events. v1 StudioOpened has {id}; v2 adds owner; current (v3) renames owner to founder. Show upcast(raw) switching on type and version.
Write an upcast(raw: unknown) function for GlazeTest events. v1 GlazeTestScored carries a number score; v2 splits it into {rawScore, normalized}. Throw UnknownEventError on unknown shapes.
Build a read-model rebuild function for ArtistCollective. Read events in batches from a revision cursor, project each, persist the view, and advance the cursor.
Show a resumable MarketStall read-model rebuild with progress reporting. Use batchSize, a from cursor, and call project per event.
Build a minimal CQRS boundary for ArtisanStudio. handleCommand uses Decider plus appendToStream; queryView reads from a separate read store. Include a comment noting eventual consistency.
Write a pure saga react(event) for ExhibitionPiece: PieceSubmitted triggers ScheduleReview; ReviewPassed triggers AcceptPiece. Return null for events the saga does not care about.
Implement a TradeShowEntry saga skeleton: EntryRegistered triggers AssignBooth; BoothAssigned triggers NotifyExhibitor. Pure react function, null for unrelated events.
Write a translate(event) that maps ArtistCollective domain events to integration events with a versioned schema. Map CollectiveDisbanded to null (internal only).
Implement an outbox appendWithOutbox(stream, events, outboxRows, tx) for SupplyRestock. Persist outbox rows and append to the stream in one transaction. Include a comment on the publisher worker.
Write an Effect.gen helper readStream that fetches all KilnFiring events for a stream and folds them via evolve to produce current state.
Show a pure evolve reducer for MentorshipSession with an aggregate(events) helper that folds a typed event array into state.
